channel.title: Youth on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Youth on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: …roadies !
item.description:
Q: Favorite show ?

A: Roadies.

Q: Aim in life ?

A: To be a Roadie.

Q: Ideal ?

A: Raghu sir.

Q: What are you up to these days ?

A: Sir, preparing for this season of roadies.

Q: Is this your first time ?

A: No. 5th time sir.

Q: If we don’t select you ?

A: Will come next year again sir.

WOW !
